description: A maintenance planner needs to schedule a weekly lubrication route for a maintenance technician.

nodes.task_description: Generate the list of all equipment requiring lubrication this week based on their PM schedules.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a list of 25 assets that need lubrication.

nodes.task_description: Group the assets into an optimized route based on their physical location in the plant.

expected_outcome.value: The system creates an efficient path for the technician to follow.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for the lubrication route and assign it to a technician.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the work order with the list of assets and the optimized route.
